query: Triangle ABC AB=3 BC=2007 CA=2008 angle bisector parallel CD/DF
notes: Angle bisector AE/EC=1/669, F on AB with EF||BC, vectors give CD/DF=670=option C

query: OEIS elliptic divisibility sequence 37a1 y^2+y=x^3-x point (0,0)
notes: OEIS A006769 exact match. Values for n=23..32 confirmed.

query: polynomial 2006 distinct integer roots minimum nonzero coefficients largest prime factor
notes: Descartes: k terms => <=2(k-1) nonzero roots. Need k>=1004. Roots +-1..+-1003 achieve 1004 terms. 1004=4*251, largest prime=251.

query: circumcircle APQ cuts AB at D AC at E BD=CE find AB/AC m+n
notes: Power of B=BD*BA=BP*BQ=8, Power of C=CE*CA=35. BD=CE=>AB/AC=8/35, m+n=43.

query: triangle ABC same areas CBD BAE ACF extensions 120 112 104 minimum area
notes: Equal area condition: 120/b=112/a=104/c => a:b:c=14:15:13. Area by Heron=84.

query: n-order determinant sum of cofactors row 1
notes: Replace row1 with (1..1), reduce to det(D-uu^T)=n!(1-sum 1/i) by matrix det lemma.

query: base 7 alternating 1s and 0s how many prime
notes: CONFLICT: 1 not prime by modern def; 50=2*25; 2451=3*19*43; all composite. Wolfram=0. Teachers=A=\boxed{1}. Possible textbook uses old 1-is-prime convention.

query: integral 6/cos^7(-4x)sin(4x) dx
notes: u=cot(4x): result=(3/2)*(3/2cot^2+3/4cot^4+1/6cot^6-ln|cot|)+C. +1/6 term and -ln = option C.

query: A walks B bikes 5km same time back and forth total B distance
notes: B travels at 2v throughout time T=5/v. Total B distance=10km.

query: contour integral dz/(z-1)^2(z^2+1) C: (x-1)^2+(y-1)^2=2
notes: Circle center (1,1) rad sqrt(2). Poles z=1 (inside, order2, Res=-1/2) and z=i (inside, Res=1/4). I=2pi*i*(-1/4)=-pi*i/2.

query: entropy rate 3x3x3 maze random walk base 2
integral (4x^2+25x+7)/sqrt(x^2+8x)
notes: Write numerator as 4(x^2+8x)+(-7/2)(2x+8)+35. Integral=(2x+1)*sqrt(x^2+8x)+3*ln|x+4+sqrt(x^2+8x)|+C.

query: volume rotation about x-axis sqrt(x)+sqrt(y)=sqrt(5)
notes: Sub v=sqrt(5)-sqrt(x): 2pi*int_0^sqrt5 v^4*(sqrt5-v)dv=2pi*[sqrt5*v^5/5-v^6/6]_0^sqrt5=pi*25/3.

query: compound Poisson process exponential jumps E Var characteristic function
notes: Exp(mu) jumps with lambda=5: E=5t/mu, Var=10t/mu^2, phi_Y=exp(j5vt/(mu-jv)). Option A.

query: cubic least squares approximation e^x on [-1,1]
notes: Normal equations: c0=0.9963, c1=0.9980, c2=0.5367, c3=0.1761. Matches option A.

query: integral 1/sin^5(x) dx Weierstrass substitution
Poisson renewal process j-th arrival time CDF Gamma distribution
notes: F_{T_j}(t)=1-e^{-lambda*t}*sum_{i=0}^{j-1}(lambda*t)^i/i!. Standard Gamma CDF. Option J.

query: series expansion (1+x)^m approximate 15^(1/4) accuracy 0.0001
genus double cover projective curve canonical sheaf simple zeros
notes: Section s has 4g-4 simple zeros = branch points. Riemann-Hurwitz: 2g(Sigma)-2=2(2g-2)+(4g-4)=8g-8 => g(Sigma)=4g-3. Option H.

query: extreme value theorem open closed interval sin(x) x^2 max min
notes: 1.Closed EVT->T. 2.Open sin->F. 3.Closed x^2 min at 0->T. 4.Open sin min->F. 5.x^2 open min at x=0 inside->T.

query: match cubic quartic quintic binomial trinomial monomial polynomials
notes: 1->D (cubic), 2->A (trinomial), 3->C (quartic binomial), 4->B (square of cubic), 5->E (quintic monomial).

query: mean median of data set books read
notes: Data repeated twice (n=38). Sum=170, mean=4.47. Sorted median positions 19,20=both 4, median=4.
